testcase.name: AccountGenerator > should start account generation workflow
AccountGenerator > should run load countries step
AccountGenerator > should run data generation step
AccountGenerator > should match country correctly in _generateAddress
AIService (Multi-Provider) > should resolve different providers for text and media
AIService (Multi-Provider) > should use media credentials for image generation
AIService (Multi-Provider) > should fallback to core key if media key is missing
AIService (Multi-Provider) > should support Gemini provider for text
CacheService > should set and get a value
CacheService > should return null for expired entries (manual mock)
CacheService > should delete entries
CacheService > should evict oldest entries when limit reached
CacheService > should use the remember pattern
CacheService > should return stats
ContractValidator > should validate a correct product payload
ContractValidator > should fail if field type is incorrect
DeleteCoordinatorService > should start full deletion workflow
DeleteCoordinatorService > should run discovery step
DeleteCoordinatorService > should handle order deletion step
Data Generation Reliability > Product Generation > should generate valid simple products
Data Generation Reliability > Product Generation > should generate valid products with variants
Data Generation Reliability > Account Generation > should generate valid accounts
Data Generation Reliability > Warehouse Generation > should generate valid warehouses
HealthService > should register default health checks
HealthService > should return system info
HealthService > should run all health checks and return a healthy status
HealthService > should return unhealthy if memory check fails
LiferayService > should fetch products using the mocked Liferay API
LiferayService > should fetch accounts using the mocked Liferay API
LiferayService > should fetch orders using the mocked Liferay API
LiferayService > should fetch price lists using the mocked Liferay API
LiferayService > should fetch warehouses using the mocked Liferay API
LiferayService > should fetch batch status using the mocked Liferay API
LiferayService > should fail to create products batch if contract is violated
Orchestration Safety (Ghost Step Protection) > should throw a FATAL ERROR if a step handler is missing
Orchestration Safety (Ghost Step Protection) > should allow structural steps (parallel/sequence) without handlers
Orchestration Safety (Ghost Step Protection) > should correctly mark a synchronous step as complete via completeSyncStep
OrderGenerator > should start order generation workflow
OrderGenerator > should run order data generation step
OrderGenerator > should handle order creation step (batch mode)
OrderGenerator > should handle order creation step (individual mode)
Payload Cleaner (Strict ID Guard) > should remove the root "id" field regardless of value
Payload Cleaner (Strict ID Guard) > should remove specialized IDs if they are 0 or null
Payload Cleaner (Strict ID Guard) > should remove IDs within the known Mock/Ghost ranges
Payload Cleaner (Strict ID Guard) > should PRESERVE resolved IDs outside of mock ranges
Payload Cleaner (Strict ID Guard) > should recursively clean nested objects
Payload Cleaner (Strict ID Guard) > should remove the parent key if the nested object becomes empty after cleaning
Payload Cleaner (Strict ID Guard) > should handle arrays correctly
PersistenceService > should initialize the schema correctly
PersistenceService > should retrieve a session by ID
PersistenceService > should update session status
PersistenceService > should create and retrieve batches for a session
PersistenceService > should update batch details
PersistenceService > should verify dependency readiness
PersistenceService > should log workflow events
ProductGenerator > should start product generation workflow
ProductGenerator > should run product data generation step
ProductGenerator > should handle product creation step
Resilience & Retry > should retry on transient failures and eventually succeed
Resilience & Retry > should fail after maximum retries
Schema Alignment (Drift Detection) > should align account.json with the corresponding Liferay API contract
Schema Alignment (Drift Detection) > should align order.json with the corresponding Liferay API contract
Schema Alignment (Drift Detection) > should align pdf.json with the corresponding Liferay API contract
Schema Alignment (Drift Detection) > should align pricing.json with the corresponding Liferay API contract
Schema Alignment (Drift Detection) > should align product.json with the corresponding Liferay API contract
Schema Alignment (Drift Detection) > should align warehouse.json with the corresponding Liferay API contract
Security Middleware - SQL Injection > should allow legitimate batch operation codes in callback path
Security Middleware - SQL Injection > should still block actual SQL keywords in other fields
Security Middleware - SQL Injection > should block SQL keywords in opCode if path is not callback
LiferayService Parity > should ensure all public methods in LiferayService bridge to existing implementation methods
WebSocketService > should initialize correctly
WebSocketService > should handle broadcast
WebSocketService > should close correctly
WorkflowCoordinator > should delegate step to correct generator
WorkflowCoordinator > should throw a FATAL ERROR if no handler found in any generator
